Visitor.title: Visitor
Visitor.description: Represents an individual visitor to the library, storing their identifying information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Visitor entity.

institutionalId.description: The official ID provided by the institution (e.g., student ID, employee ID) for visitor identification.

email.description: The institutional email address of the visitor, used for identification.

fullName.description: The full name of the visitor.

collegeOrOffice.description: The college or office the visitor is affiliated with within the institution.

Purpose.title: Purpose
Purpose.description: Represents a predefined common purpose for visiting the library, often suggested by an AI tool.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Purpose entity.

name.description: The descriptive name of the purpose (e.g., 'Study', 'Research', 'Meeting').

description.description: A more detailed explanation of the purpose.

VisitLog.title: VisitLog
VisitLog.description: Records each instance of a visitor signing into and out of the library.

id.description: Unique identifier for the VisitLog entry.

visitorId.description: Reference to the Visitor entity who made this visit. (Relationship: Visitor 1:N VisitLog)

timeIn.description: Timestamp indicating when the visitor signed into the library.

timeOut.description: Timestamp indicating when the visitor signed out of the library. Null or missing for active sessions.

purposeId.description: Reference to the Purpose entity describing the primary reason for the visit. (Relationship: Purpose 1:N VisitLog)

customPurposeDescription.description: Optional free-text field for a purpose not covered by predefined categories.

BlockEntry.title: BlockEntry
BlockEntry.description: Manages records of visitors who are blocked from accessing the library, along with reasons and status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BlockEntry entity.

visitorId.description: Reference to the Visitor entity who is blocked. (Relationship: Visitor 1:N BlockEntry)

blockReason.description: A detailed explanation of why the visitor has been blocked.

blockedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the block was initiated.

isActive.description: Boolean flag indicating if the block is currently active (true) or has been lifted (false).

definition.description: Collection storing UIDs of users who have administrative privileges. The mere existence of a document signifies admin status (DBAC).

params.name: adminId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of an administrator.

definition.description: Collection for predefined visit purposes. Globally readable for visitor sign-in, writeable only by administrators.

params.name: purposeId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Purpose entity.

definition.description: Collection storing profiles of library visitors. Access is restricted to administrators and trusted backend services for read/write operations.

params.name: visitorId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Visitor entity.

definition.description: Collection recording each library visit. Access is restricted to administrators. Includes denormalized 'visitorFullName' and 'visitorCollegeOrOffice' for authorization independence and QAP support.

params.name: visitLogId
params.description: Unique identifier for the VisitLog entry.

definition.description: Collection managing records of blocked visitors. Access is restricted to administrators. Includes denormalized 'visitorFullName' and 'visitorInstitutionalId' for authorization independence and QAP support.

params.name: blockEntryId
params.description: Unique identifier for the BlockEntry entity.
